---
title: "From Sourcing to Scale"
subtitle: "Building data-driven ventures across the US and UAE"
author: "Saad Al Awadhi"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, presentation.scss]
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    incremental: false
    center-title-slide: true
    footer: "Saad Al Awadhi · Cal Poly Pomona"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

## Hi, I'm Saad {.center}

Entrepreneur · Business Development · Product Sourcing

Founder of **S&N Supplies** · Co-founder of **Impact Lights**

BBA Marketing Management — Cal Poly Pomona

---

## The thesis

> Great sourcing is a research problem before it's a logistics problem.

I win on **market analysis**, **supplier negotiation**, and **measuring what works** — then I make it repeatable.

---

## What I do

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Operate**

- Cross-border wholesale
- Amazon FBA supply
- E-commerce D2C
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Analyze**

- Market & product research
- Margin & funnel metrics
- Marketing automation
:::
:::

---

## S&N Supplies at a glance

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 3.6
library(ggplot2)
df <- data.frame(
  cat = factor(c("Health/Beauty","Kitchen","Grocery","Electronics","Closeout"),
               levels = c("Health/Beauty","Kitchen","Grocery","Electronics","Closeout")),
  share = c(28,20,18,16,18)
)
ggplot(df, aes(cat, share, fill = cat)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0d3b45","#1a5560","#c07a43","#d59a6b","#6b7671")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Sourcing share (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA)
  )
```

---

## Automating growth

I designed a lead-gen pipeline that turns manual prospecting into a system:

**Apollo.io** → **Make.com** → **AI drafting** → **Outreach**

More time for the work that actually needs a human: negotiation and partnerships.

---

## The numbers I care about

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}
### Margin
Every category earns its shelf space.
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
### Repeat rate
Retention beats acquisition cost.
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
### Throughput
Pipeline volume, week over week.
:::
:::

---

## Beyond business

- UAE National Service — **distinction, 12/12**
- First-place **equestrian** finishes in Dubai
- Motorsport & track driving at Willow Springs

Discipline and performance under pressure — on and off the track.

---

## Let's talk {.center}

**Saad Al Awadhi**

[sn-supplies.com](https://sn-supplies.com) · you@sn-supplies.com

Thank you.
